metadata.description: Claude Code governance plugins for TypeScript, Expo, NestJS, CDK, and Rails projects

plugins.name: typescript
plugins.description: Claude Code governance plugin for TypeScript projects — universal skills, agents, hooks, and rules plus TypeScript-specific tooling

plugins.name: expo
plugins.description: Claude Code governance plugin for Expo/React Native projects — universal skills plus Expo-specific tooling (Apollo Client, Gluestack, Expo Router, Playwright, Maestro)

plugins.name: nestjs
plugins.description: Claude Code governance plugin for NestJS/GraphQL projects — universal skills plus NestJS-specific tooling (GraphQL, TypeORM, security scanning)

plugins.name: cdk
plugins.description: Claude Code governance plugin for AWS CDK projects — universal skills, agents, hooks, and rules plus TypeScript tooling

plugins.name: rails
plugins.description: Claude Code governance plugin for Ruby on Rails projects — universal skills plus Rails-specific tooling (ActionController, ActionView, ActiveRecord)
